---
title: "Homework 9"
author: "Marley McGehee"
date: "4/02/2026"
output:  
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyr)
library(Lock5Data)
library(tidyverse)

```


## General Social Survey

### Marital Status
```{r}
gss_cat_mar <- gss_cat %>% 
  mutate(marital = fct_collapse(marital,
"Pre Marriage" = c("Never married"),
"Marriage" = c("Married", "Separated"),
"Post Marriage" = c("Divorced", "Widowed"),
"Missing" = c("No answer")
)) 


knitr::kable(gss_cat_mar %>% 
  count(marital))
```

^[Question 1 complete]
